message:
fix(command,conformance,store): shared upvalue capture, LATENCY fixture corrections, resilient key decoding

Lua upvalue capture (lua_eval.rs):
- Wrap scope locals in Rc<RefCell<LuaValue>> so closures sharing
  the same upvalue see each other's mutations, matching Lua 5.1
  semantics for captured variables.
- Env::get_local now returns owned LuaValue via borrow().clone().
- Env::set_existing_local mutates in-place through RefCell instead
  of reinserting into the HashMap.
- Snapshot and from_captured updated to propagate Rc<RefCell<>> types.

Conformance fixtures (core_connection.json, core_server.json):
- LATENCY RESET returns integer 0 (count of reset events), not
  simple "OK", matching real Redis behaviour.
- LATENCY HISTORY and GRAPH fixtures now include required <event>
  argument ("command").
- LATENCY GRAPH with no samples expects an error string instead of
  bulk null.
- Add DOCTOR subcommand to LATENCY HELP expected output.

Store key decoding (fr-store/src/lib.rs):
- Replace expect("well-formed DB key") with `?` so malformed keys
  are silently skipped instead of panicking during KEYS iteration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
